search_records.query: site:lastzwiki.com/en Last Z guide heroes research
search_records.searched_query: site:lastzwiki.com/en Last Z guide heroes research
search_records.search_notes: Restricted results to lastzwiki.com. Prioritized specific guide pages over generic home pages. No public-facing mechanics should be treated as verified from these leads alone.

results.title: Heroes - Last Z Wiki | Tier List, Stats & Complete Character Guide 2026
results.evidence_summary: Dedicated hero hub with hero list, faction filters, equipment, and character pages; useful for hero discovery and cross-checking faction roles.
results.primary_user_job: Find hero roster, faction groupings, and related equipment pages.

results.title: Laboratory Badges in Last Z - Complete Research Guide | Last Z Wiki
results.evidence_summary: Research hub with category tabs, search, and per-level badge cost tables; useful for discovery of research names and cost structure.
results.primary_user_job: Look up research categories, names, and badge cost tables.

results.title: Last Z Wiki - Complete English Guide | Strategies, Tier List & Tips 2026
results.evidence_summary: Main English hub linking to heroes, research, buildings, alliances, and season guides; good entry point for broader discovery.
results.primary_user_job: Navigate to major guide sections from one starting page.

search_records.searched_query: site:last-z.wiki Last Z heroes events research cost

search_records.no_results_reason: No matching pages were indexed or discoverable for the provided terms on the allowed domain.

search_records.search_notes: Search constrained to the approved domain returned no results for the requested query.
search_records.no_results_reason: No matching pages were indexed or discoverable on the allowed domain for this query.

search_records.query: site:lastz.fandom.com Last Z heroes research events
search_records.searched_query: site:lastz.fandom.com Last Z heroes research events
search_records.search_notes: Search was constrained to lastz.fandom.com. Results emphasize research/event and hero-related pages relevant to discovery and cross-validation.

results.title: Full Preparedness | Last Z: Survival Shooter Wiki | Fandom
results.evidence_summary: Daily event that includes an Age of Science round for research speed-ups and a Hero Initiative round for hero upgrades; useful for event-mechanics cross-checks.
results.primary_user_job: Confirm which daily event rounds reward research and hero spending.

results.title: Heroes | Last Z: Survival Shooter Wiki | Fandom
results.evidence_summary: Core hero overview page listing hero types and the main hero power factors, helpful for identifying hero-related guide topics.
results.primary_user_job: Understand what heroes are and what drives hero power.

results.title: Event Center | Last Z: Survival Shooter Wiki | Fandom
results.evidence_summary: Hub page for regular and special events; useful as a directory entry for event discovery and navigation.
results.primary_user_job: Find event categories and where event details live.

search_records.search_notes: Search restricted to www.packsify.com only. No matching indexed pages were found for the exact query. Consider broader packsify.com path variants or alternate guide keywords under the same domain for discovery.
search_records.no_results_reason: No indexed results matched the approved domain-filtered query.

search_records.search_notes: Search was limited to mmediamreza.com and prioritized Last Z-specific guide pages over generic home pages. Results favor concrete gameplay reference pages useful for topic discovery and cross-validation.

results.title: Shooter Camp Guide - | Last Z: Survival Shooter
results.evidence_summary: Guide for training long-range units; covers unlocks, upgrade table, cap, speed, and power.
results.primary_user_job: Plan Shooter Camp upgrades and unit training.

results.title: Assaulter Camp Guide - Train Faster & Gain Power - | Last Z: Survival Shooter
results.evidence_summary: Guide for frontline troop training; includes speed, cap, power, and progression milestones.
results.primary_user_job: Plan Assaulter Camp upgrades and training efficiency.

results.title: Last Z Laboratory Guide: Tech Research & Lab No. 2 Unlocking - | Last Z: Survival Shooter
results.evidence_summary: Research building guide; covers technologies, second lab unlock, and research bottlenecks.
results.primary_user_job: Track research prerequisites and lab progression.
